ruleset.name: Go Rules
ruleset.description:
PHPMD's default rules tuned for idiomatic Go. It pulls in every built-in ruleset, but quiets a few rules whose PHP defaults are a poor fit for Go:
* Naming/ShortVariable is dropped: short names (i, r, ok, fn, ...) are idiomatic in Go, where scope is small. * Naming/LongVariable's maximum is raised to 35, since Go favors descriptive MixedCaps names over PHP's terser style. * Design/ExitExpression is dropped because os.Exit in main() is idiomatic. * Design/CountInLoopExpression is dropped because len() on a Go slice is O(1), unlike PHP's count().
